loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative active and reactive energy for this month across outgoing feeders; SEC (kWh/t) is not measured as no production tonnage data is available.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for the panel's fed feeders (PRIMARY side); some members (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing total apparent power and active/reactive breakdown — rated capacity and peak markers are ungroundable for this asset.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing total panel active power demand (Worst Peak, Load Factor) — per-feeder breakdown (UPS, BPDP, HHF) is not measured for this panel as those specific feeder groups are not present in the PRIMARY member roster.
